info.name: AgentCourt API
info.description:
AgentCourt — Policy-driven dispute resolution for agent commerce.

Base URL: https://agentcourt-api-production.up.railway.app

Submit disputes across 4 policy templates (20 rules) and get deterministic, evidence-weighted rulings.

request.description: Submit a non-delivery dispute. Expected ruling: non-delivery / full_refund
Submit a milestone payment dispute. Expected ruling: milestone-completed-unpaid / full_payment_plus_penalty
Submit a bug bounty dispute. Expected ruling: valid-bug-full-payout / full_payout
Submit an SLA breach dispute. Expected ruling: uptime-violation / service_credit
View all public verdicts from the dashboard
View a specific policy template with all rules
